name: kuro-kainos
description: Kuro Kainos Lietuvoje — native Android/iOS shell (Capacitor) around the PWA.

scripts.mkwww: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('www',{recursive:true});for(const f of ['index.html','app.js','i18n.js','service-worker.js','manifest.webmanifest']){if(fs.existsSync(f))fs.copyFileSync(f,'www/'+f)};for(const f of fs.readdirSync('.')){if(/\.(png|ico|svg)$/.test(f))fs.copyFileSync(f,'www/'+f)};fs.cpSync('data','www/data',{recursive:true});console.log('www/ built')"
scripts.sync: npm run mkwww && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run sync && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run sync && npx cap open ios
